procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1003.008
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1003.008 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

execution.command_line: ['docker', 'run', '--rm', '--name', 'seraph-sandbox-a3d30d722b74', '--network', 'none', '--cap-drop', 'ALL', '--cap-add', 'SETUID', '--cap-add', 'SETGID', '--cap-add', 'CHOWN', '--cap-add', 'DAC_OVERRIDE', '--cap-add', 'FOWNER', '--cap-add', 'SYS_PTRACE', '--cap-add', 'NET_RAW', '--security-opt', 'no-new-privileges:false', '--tmpfs', '/tmp:exec,size=512m', '-v', '/home/byron/Downloads/Metatron-triune-outbound-gate/atomic-red-team:/opt/atomic-red-team:ro', '-v', '/home/byron/Downloads/Metatron-triune-outbound-gate/tools/invoke-atomicredteam:/opt/invoke-atomicredteam:ro', '-v', '/home/byron/Downloads/Metatron-triune-outbound-gate/tools/powershell:/opt/pwsh:ro', 'seraph-sandbox-tools:latest', '/opt/pwsh/pwsh', '-NonInteractive', '-NoProfile', '-Command', 'Import-Module \'/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1\' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder=\'/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics\'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf \'#!/usr/bin/env bash\\nbase64 "$@"\\n\' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host \'[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed\'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1003.008 -PathToAtomicsFolder \'/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics\' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host \'[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1003.008\'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1003.008 -PathToAtomicsFolder \'/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics\' -TestNumbers 1']

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1003.008 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1003.008'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1003.008 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: OpenCanary - MSSQL Login Attempt Via SQLAuth
OpenCanary - MSSQL Login Attempt Via Windows Authentication

osquery.name: t1003_008_shadow_read
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE (target_path LIKE '%shadow%' OR target_path LIKE '%passwd%' OR target_path LIKE '%.ssh/%' OR target_path LIKE '%credential%') LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1003_008_proc_cred
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%shadow%' OR cmdline LIKE '%passwd%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mimikatz%' OR cmdline LIKE '%credential%' OR cmdline LIKE '%hashdump%' LIMIT 100;
